user.title: Sourdough Monitor Setup
user.description: Name this starter and choose your preferred unit system. All values are stored in grams internally and converted for display.

data_description.name: A name for this starter, e.g. "Rye Starter". Used as the device name so multiple starters can be told apart.
data_description.unit_system: Choose metric (grams) or imperial (ounces) for display.

amounts.title: Feeding Amounts & Schedule
amounts.description: Set the amounts for each feeding. The recipe default is ½ cup flour ({recipe_flour}) and ¼ cup water ({recipe_water}) per feeding.

data.vessel_tare_g: Empty vessel / jar weight ({unit}, 0 to skip)

data_description.flour_g: Amount of flour added at each feeding. Recipe default: {recipe_flour}.
data_description.water_g: Amount of water added at each feeding. Recipe default: {recipe_water}.
data_description.vessel_tare_g: Weight of the empty jar or container. Used to calculate how much starter you have.
data_description.discard_ratio: Fraction of starter to discard before each feeding on Day 3 and beyond.
data_description.maintenance_interval_hours: How often to feed once the starter is mature (Day 8+). Use 12 for a room-temperature starter, or 168 (7 days) for a fridge-stored, weekly-fed starter as in The Sourdough Framework.
data_description.maintenance_discard: Whether to discard part of the starter before each maintenance feeding. Turn off if you keep a small amount instead of discarding (common for fridge-stored, weekly routines).
data_description.starter_type: Liquid (≈100% hydration) or stiff (≈50-60%, better suited to fridge storage). Descriptive only — hydration is calculated from the flour and water amounts above.
data_description.flour_type: The flour this starter is maintained on. Descriptive only.

error.flour_must_be_positive: Flour amount must be greater than 0.
error.water_must_be_positive: Water amount must be greater than 0.

data.vessel_tare_g: Empty vessel / jar weight (0 to skip)

data_description.maintenance_interval_hours: How often to feed once the starter is mature (Day 8+). Use 12 for a room-temperature starter, or 168 (7 days) for a fridge-stored, weekly-fed starter as in The Sourdough Framework.
data_description.maintenance_discard: Whether to discard part of the starter before each maintenance feeding. Turn off if you keep a small amount instead of discarding (common for fridge-stored, weekly routines).
data_description.starter_type: Liquid (≈100% hydration) or stiff (≈50-60%, better suited to fridge storage). Descriptive only.
data_description.flour_type: The flour this starter is maintained on. Descriptive only.

error.flour_must_be_positive: Flour amount must be greater than 0.
error.water_must_be_positive: Water amount must be greater than 0.
